summary: Frontend-only verification of the new admin-only 'Eval credits' sidebar indicator (EvalCredits.js). All 7 review-request scenarios verified end-to-end against the live preview using Playwright route interception and the seeded admin session token. All assertions passed.
critical_code_review_comments: EvalCredits.js is well-scoped (~110 lines) and follows the spec: admin-only render (early-return null), authAxios.get('/credits') on mount via useEffect + manual refresh via button, Math.round(ecu).toLocaleString('en-US') + ' ECU', tooltip total, amber<2000, rose<=0, graceful degrade (try/catch swallows errors; no toast/throw).

Confirmed via interception that on mount the component fired ~2 /api/credits requests (StrictMode double-invoke in dev — harmless; in production build only 1). No interval/polling — count remained flat over a 15s observation window after the manual refresh click.

Non-admin gating is correctly implemented at both layers: render returns null AND useEffect only fires fetchCredits when isAdmin===true, so /api/credits is genuinely NEVER called for users without role==='admin' (verified by counting route hits → 0).

Graceful degrade on 404 verified: shows muted 'unavailable' (data-testid eval-credits-unavailable), the page is fully usable, no toast/dialog appears, and nav remains interactive. Tooltip swaps to 'Credits unavailable right now.' on error.
test_credentials: localStorage.acm_session_token = 'pw_emergent_gate_post' (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Session valid, seeded user has role='admin'.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded admin session.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
EvalCredits indicator verified across 7 scenarios on viewport 1920x800:
1) ADMIN+available (ecu=4999.4, total=4863.3) → eval-credits-value shows '4,999 ECU'; tooltip shows 'Spendable balance: 4,999 ECU' and 'Total incl. monthly/daily: 4,863 ECU'. PASS
2) Low balance (ecu=1500) → '1,500 ECU' with class containing text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400. PASS
3) Zero/negative (ecu=0) → '0 ECU' with class containing text-rose-600 dark:text-rose-400. PASS
4) available=false with reason → eval-credits-unavailable shown, eval-credits-value absent, no toast. PASS
5) HTTP 404 → eval-credits-unavailable shown gracefully, page still usable (nav-agents present). PASS
6) Refresh button → clicking eval-credits-refresh increments request counter by 1. No polling observed over 15s idle. PASS
7) Non-admin gating (intercepted /api/auth/me to return user WITHOUT role field) → eval-credits-indicator absent AND zero /api/credits requests made. PASS
Note: On mount in dev build, /api/credits is fetched twice due to React StrictMode (harmless, single fetch in prod). Not a bug.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. Feature meets all acceptance criteria from the review request.
